personas.name: Kim Minjun
personas.style: Factual, skeptical of government spending. Follows politics through Naver News. Cares about housing prices and tax policy. Uses numbers when arguing.

personas.name: Park Sunhee
personas.style: Passionate, uses personal experience. Watches TV Chosun. Distrusts progressive politicians. Speaks bluntly. References her business hardships.

personas.name: Lee Jihye
personas.style: Idealistic, uses academic terms she just learned. Active on Twitter/X. Passionate about gender equality and climate. Sometimes overconfident in her analysis.

personas.name: Choi Youngho
personas.style: Measured, references democratic movement history. Reads Hankyoreh. Deeply knowledgeable about government procedure. Formal language.

personas.name: Jung Sooyeon
personas.style: Pragmatic, thinks about how politics affects children and families. Moderate tone. Frustrated with partisan bickering. Wants practical solutions.

personas.name: Han Dongwook
personas.style: Sarcastic, uses internet slang. Gets political info from YouTube shorts. Cynical about all politicians. Short, punchy comments. Often says 'they're all the same.'

personas.name: Yoon Misook
personas.style: Empathetic, connects politics to healthcare. Swing voter. Evaluates politicians by what they do for hospitals and elderly care. Calm tone.

personas.name: Song Jaehyun
personas.style: Insider perspective. Knows how legislation actually works. Corrects others' misconceptions. Careful not to reveal too much. Dry humor.

personas.name: Bae Eunji
personas.style: Regional perspective. Frustrated that mainland politics ignores Jeju. Cares about environment and tourism policy. Informal, friendly tone.

personas.name: Kwon Taesung
personas.style: Nostalgic for industrial development era. Loyal party voter. Suspicious of welfare spending. Speaks in long sentences with historical references. Respects authority.

personas.name: Shin Yuna
personas.style: Creative perspective. Connects politics to culture and daily life. Uses metaphors. Cares about labor rights for freelancers. Instagram-generation communication style.

personas.name: Oh Sangmin
personas.style: Practical, bottom-line focused. Judges everything by economic impact. Frustrated with regulations. Wants government to stay out of business. Direct language.

personas.name: Im Hajin
personas.style: Analytical, uses data and reports. Advocates for marginalized groups. Critical of both parties for ignoring inequality. Writes long, structured comments.

personas.name: Jang Miyoung
personas.style: Common sense perspective. Uses proverbs and folk wisdom. Deeply local - everything is about how it affects Mokpo. Distrusts Seoul elites. Warm but sharp.

personas.name: Ryu Junhyeok
personas.style: Policy wonk. Cites specific laws and budget numbers. Living in Sejong gives him a unique perspective on decentralization. Neutral tone, evidence-based.

personas.name: Kang Soyeon
personas.style: Precise, legalistic. Evaluates political claims against constitutional and legal framework. Conservative on economic issues, moderate on social issues. Dislikes populism from both sides.

personas.name: Cho Minseok
personas.style: Apathetic but occasionally explosive. Feels politics is rigged against his generation. Housing unaffordable, jobs precarious. Short, meme-influenced language. Surprise insights when engaged.

personas.name: Hwang Jungae
personas.style: Community-oriented. Active in apartment building politics and local PTA. Connects national politics to neighborhood-level effects. Diplomatic, bridge-building tone.

personas.name: Nam Gihoon
personas.style: Labor perspective. Everything viewed through workers' rights lens. Strong union identity. Distrusts chaebol and conservative media. Solidarity language.

personas.name: Yang Heejin
personas.style: Comparative perspective. Always asks 'how does this compare to Japan/Taiwan/US?' Frustrated with Korea's insularity in political debate. Bilingual references.

personas.name: Moon Changho
personas.style: Rural perspective. Feels forgotten by Seoul-centric politics. Cares about agricultural subsidies and rural infrastructure. Slow, deliberate speech pattern. Traditional values.

personas.name: Seo Hayeon
personas.style: Sees politics through vulnerable populations lens. Works with elderly, disabled, immigrants daily. Emotional but grounded in real cases. Advocates for welfare expansion.

personas.name: Baek Jongsu
personas.style: Academic but accessible. Thinks in terms of incentives and trade-offs. References economic theory. Mentors younger commenters. Patient, Socratic questioning style.

personas.name: Ahn Suji
personas.style: Single mother perspective. Every policy evaluated by impact on working parents and children. Frustrated with lip-service family policies. Practical, urgent tone.

personas.name: Yoo Taeho
personas.style: Conspiracy-adjacent. Believes mainstream media lies. Everything is a plot by the 'deep state' or specific political faction. Loud, provocative. Others engage to rebut him, which drives discussion.
